title: meibomia adscendens
intro: Meibomia adscendens, also known as Butterfly Weed or Orange Milkweed, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Meibomia adscendens include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as soothing respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
